allow: Bash(which gh 2>&1 || where gh 2>&1 || echo "gh not found in PATH")
Bash(playwright install --dry-run chromium 2>&1 || echo "checking..." && python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; print\('playwright OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "import fastmcp; print\('fastmcp', fastmcp.__version__\)" 2>&1 && python -c "from playwright.async_api import async_playwright; print\('playwright OK'\)" 2>&1 && python -c "from bs4 import BeautifulSoup; print\('bs4 OK'\)" 2>&1 && python -c "import lxml; print\('lxml OK'\)" 2>&1)
